query: INSERT INTO tenant_email_branding (tenant_id, from_addr, from_name, reply_to, smtp_url, smtp_password_enc, footer_html, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, now()) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id) DO UPDATE SET from_addr = EXCLUDED.from_addr, from_name = EXCLUDED.from_name, reply_to = EXCLUDED.reply_to, smtp_url = EXCLUDED.smtp_url, smtp_password_enc = EXCLUDED.smtp_password_enc, footer_html = EXCLUDED.footer_html, updated_at = now()
